rlm_compliance.description: Dashboard must show EVERY layer of system state, not just summaries

boot_timeline.command: sqlite3 /var/lib/sys-inspector/sys-inspector.db "DELETE FROM boot_health WHERE total_ms = 0 OR total_ms IS NULL;"

active_errors.current_issue: Shows 'No active errors' but journal has 39,286 entries
active_errors.command: sudo sqlite3 /var/lib/sys-inspector/sys-inspector.db "INSERT INTO error_log (timestamp, service, severity, message) SELECT recorded_at, syslog_identifier, CASE WHEN priority <= 2 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN priority = 3 THEN 'ERROR' ELSE 'WARNING' END, substr(message,1,500) FROM journal_entries WHERE priority <= 3 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM error_log WHERE message = journal_entries.message LIMIT 1);"
active_errors.improvement: Show last 20 errors with severity coloring

new_section.title: 📈 Top Processes by CPU
new_section.query: SELECT pid, name, cpu_percent, mem_percent, state FROM processes ORDER BY cpu_percent DESC LIMIT 20

process_tree.command: sqlite3 /var/lib/sys-inspector/sys-inspector.db "SELECT pid, name, cpu_percent, mem_percent, state FROM processes ORDER BY cpu_percent DESC LIMIT 20;"

failed_services.current_issue: Service states show counts, not which services failed

new_section.title: ⚠️ Failed System Services
new_section.fallback: Check database for services with state != 'active'

security_events.current_issue: No SELinux or audit logs shown

network_insight.fix: Add listening ports and connections to dashboard
commands: sqlite3 /var/lib/sys-inspector/sys-inspector.db "SELECT port, protocol FROM listening_ports ORDER BY port;"
sqlite3 /var/lib/sys-inspector/sys-inspector.db "SELECT local_addr, remote_addr, state, process FROM network_connections WHERE state='ESTAB' LIMIT 20;"

resource_trends.current_issue: Shows only latest sample, no history
resource_trends.fix: Add small chart of last 10 resource samples

new_section.title: 📊 Resource History (last 10 samples)
new_section.query: SELECT sampled_at, cpu_user, cpu_system, mem_used_percent FROM resource_samples ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10

new_section.title: 📰 Recent System Messages (last 50)
new_section.query: SELECT datetime(recorded_at,'localtime') as ts, priority, syslog_identifier, substr(message,1,80) as msg FROM journal_entries ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 50
